calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Dec-20-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Continued To Dec-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jenny Zhao appeared via zoom for Qingjin Liang (petitioner).

Ms. Zhao reports that she has limited information, that Mr. Leung is the adopted son of Mr. Liang and may be an heir to deceased fathers' estate in Hong Kong, and that she requests for another chance to seek more information. The Court suggest hiring a private investigator to acquire more information. Petition to establish fact of death is continued to December 20, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Saephan. Not reported.
